name: gmk87-configurator
description: GMK87 Configurator — desktop app for Zuoya GMK87 keyboard (Rust + Tauri)

scripts.rebuild:via: node scripts/apply-via-gmk87-patches.mjs && npm run build:via-defs && node scripts/sync-via-public.mjs && cd .via-build && npx vite build && cd .. && node scripts/copy-via-dist.mjs && node scripts/patch-via-bundle.mjs
